message:
fix: correct widget state change reporting and wire modal backdrop hit testing

- Input: oversized paste rejection now correctly reports no state change
- List: stale multi_selected indices cleared on filter
- ModalStack: close_on_backdrop now registers actual backdrop hit regions
- DialogBuilder: backdrop/content hits wired alongside button hits

Closes #36, closes #39
